button.name: button
button.description: A highly customisable animated button with shimmer, glow, pulse, and ripple effects powered by GSAP

card.name: card
card.description: A card component with animated background gradient and hover effects

loader.name: loader
loader.description: A minimalist equalizer-style loader with animated bars using CSS-only animations.

input.name: input
input.description: A styled input component with focus states

badge.name: badge
badge.description: A badge component with rotating border light animation

floating-dock.name: floating-dock
floating-dock.description: A macOS-style floating dock with hover animations and tooltips

scroll-reveal.name: scroll-reveal
scroll-reveal.description: A GSAP + ScrollTrigger powered text reveal that animates words into view as you scroll.

navbar-floating.name: navbar-floating
navbar-floating.description: Modern floating navbar with scroll-aware styling, staggered animations, and mobile-responsive design using GSAP.

tech-marquee.name: tech-marquee
tech-marquee.description: A looping marquee of tech cards with subtle skew and hover glow, perfect for showcasing your stack.

text-reveal.name: text-reveal
text-reveal.description: Animated text reveal with word-by-word or character-by-character animation

flip-card.name: flip-card
flip-card.description: A 3D flip card with front and back faces, perfect for showcasing content

gradient-text.name: gradient-text
gradient-text.description: Animated gradient text with shimmer and color shift effects

page-transition.name: page-transition
page-transition.description: A GSAP-powered SVG sweep animation that runs between route changes using next-transition-router.

spotlight-card.name: spotlight-card
spotlight-card.description: A card with a spotlight effect that follows the mouse cursor

timeline.name: timeline
timeline.description: A vertical or horizontal timeline component with animations

gsap-button.name: gsap-button
gsap-button.description: Professionally animated button with GSAP - hover, click, and entry animations

gsap-card.name: gsap-card
gsap-card.description: 3D tilt card with mouse-following glow and shimmer border effects using GSAP

gsap-input.name: gsap-input
gsap-input.description: Animated input with gradient border reveal and focus effects using GSAP

gsap-badge.name: gsap-badge
gsap-badge.description: Animated badge with shimmer, pulse, and hover scale effects using GSAP

gsap-alert.name: gsap-alert
gsap-alert.description: Animated alert with slide-in, auto-close progress, and exit animations using GSAP

gsap-modal.name: gsap-modal
gsap-modal.description: Professional modal with backdrop fade, scale entry, and staggered content using GSAP

mouse-tracker.name: mouse-tracker
mouse-tracker.description: A GSAP-powered mouse tracker with glowing cursor, trail effects, and hover scaling.

auth-card.name: auth-card
auth-card.description: Complete sign-in/sign-up card with social login (Google, GitHub, Twitter), 3D effects, and GSAP animations

ripple-button.name: ripple-button
ripple-button.description: A highly customizable button with a concentric waveform ripple animation on click.

water-fill-button.name: water-fill-button
water-fill-button.description: A motion-powered button that fills up like water from bottom to top on hover, built with Framer Motion.

orbit-logo-button.name: orbit-logo-button
orbit-logo-button.description: A CTA button surrounded by orbiting bubbles that fly into the button on hover. Supports custom avatars and logos.

3d-image-ring.name: 3d-image-ring
3d-image-ring.description: A rotating ring of avatars or logos that orbits smoothly around a center.

navbar-glass.name: navbar-glass
navbar-glass.description: An elegant glassmorphism navbar with mouse-following glow, dropdown menus, and smooth GSAP animations.

3d-buttons.name: 3d-buttons
3d-buttons.description: A collection of 3D animated buttons powered by CSS, GSAP, and Framer Motion.

lift-3d-button.name: lift-3d-button
lift-3d-button.description: A CSS-based 3D button that lifts up on hover.

cube-3d-button.name: cube-3d-button
cube-3d-button.description: A GSAP-powered 3D button with cube rotation effects.

spring-3d-button.name: spring-3d-button
spring-3d-button.description: A Framer Motion-powered 3D button with spring physics.
